description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior is clad in white brick, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The front facade features large glass doors and windows, allowing ample natural light into the interior, and a balcony with a simple metal railing. The upper floor includes a visible balcony area with a potted plant and shelving, while the lower floor has a set of double glass doors and wide windows. The house has two prominent vertical chimneys or vent pipes extending from the roof. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, emphasizing straight lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story white brick house with large glass windows, a flat roof, and a balcony with metal railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors and windows, balcony with railing, and visible interior shelving.
description_view_1: Left side view with a plain white brick wall, partial balcony, and a potted plant visible on the balcony.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid white brick wall, two roof pipes, and no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain white brick wall and a partial view of the balcony railing.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door with adjacent large windows, no steps or porch, and a minimalist balcony above.
